# Walking

In the evening I often walk along the river near my place. I do not have a goal in mind. It is just that when I walk, the tangled thoughts in my head slowly come loose.

The water looks different every day. Some days it runs fast, and some days it is as still as glass. Noticing those small changes makes me feel like I gained something small.

By the time I get home the worry I started with has quietly gone. So today, again, I take my time and walk back slowly.
